ogTitle: Mirriwinni vs Mission Beach: Climate Safety

heading: Mirriwinni vs Mission Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mirriwinni, Queensland and Mission Beach, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mirriwinni has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Mission Beach (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mirriwinni or Mission Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mirriwinni has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Mission Beach scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mirriwinni scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Mission Beach scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mirriwinni or Mission Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mirriwinni has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
